effects.effect: Deal 30 Damage to your Opponent's Vivosaurs.

effects.name: Distress Call
effects.effect: once per turn: you can add 1 [Pachycephalo] Vivosaur from your Deck to your Hand, except "Stygi".

effects.name: Fiendish Missile
effects.effect: If you control another [Pachycephalo] Vivosaur: discard 1 card from your opponent's FP Zone.
